Module ProjetGenieLogiciel
Package fr.projet.model

Class Agent

java.lang.Object
fr.projet.model.Agent
Direct Known Subclasses:
FastAgent
public class Agent extends Object
Represents an agent moving through the graph.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructor
    Description
    Agent(int id, double speed, Node currentPosition, Node destination)
    Creates a new agent.

  • Constructor Details

    • Agent

      public Agent(int id, double speed, Node currentPosition, Node destination)
      Creates a new agent.
      Parameters:
      id - unique identifier
      speed - maximum movement speed
      currentPosition - starting node
      destination - target node

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public int getId()
      Returns the unique identifier of the agent.
      Returns:
      agent id

    • setId

      public void setId(int id)
      Sets the unique identifier of the agent.
      Parameters:
      id - new identifier

    • getSpeed

      public double getSpeed()
      Returns the maximum movement speed of the agent.
      Returns:
      speed

    • setSpeed

      public void setSpeed(double speed)
      Sets the maximum movement speed of the agent.
      Parameters:
      speed - new speed value

    • getCurrentPosition

      public Node getCurrentPosition()
      Returns the current position node of the agent.
      Returns:
      current node

    • setCurrentPosition

      public void setCurrentPosition(Node currentPosition)
      Sets the current position node of the agent.
      Parameters:
      currentPosition - new current node

    • getDestination

      public Node getDestination()
      Returns the destination node of the agent.
      Returns:
      destination node

    • setDestination

      public void setDestination(Node destination)
      Sets the destination node of the agent.
      Parameters:
      destination - new destination node

    • getState

      public State getState()
      Returns the current state of the agent.
      Returns:
      current state

    • setState

      public void setState(State state)
      Sets the current state of the agent.
      Parameters:
      state - new state

    • getProgressOnEdge

      public double getProgressOnEdge()
      Returns the progress of the agent on the current edge.
      Returns:
      distance already traveled on the current edge

    • setProgressOnEdge

      public void setProgressOnEdge(double progressOnEdge)
      Sets the progress of the agent on the current edge.
      Parameters:
      progressOnEdge - distance already traveled

    • getNextNode

      public Node getNextNode()
      Returns the next node the agent is heading to.
      Returns:
      next node

    • setNextNode

      public void setNextNode(Node nextNode)
      Sets the next node the agent is heading to.
      Parameters:
      nextNode - next target node

    • getInitialPosition

      public Node getInitialPosition()
      Returns the initial position of the agent.
      Returns:
      initial node

    • getCurrentPath

      public List<Node> getCurrentPath()
      Returns the current path followed by the agent.
      Returns:
      list of nodes representing the path

    • setCurrentPath

      public void setCurrentPath(List<Node> currentPath)
      Sets the current path followed by the agent.
      Parameters:
      currentPath - computed path from source to destination

    • getPathIndex

      public int getPathIndex()
      Returns the current index in the path.
      Returns:
      index of next node to reach

    • setPathIndex

      public void setPathIndex(int pathIndex)
      Updates the index in the current path.
      Parameters:
      pathIndex - new index in the path

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the agent.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      agent id and current position
